description: Programmatic PDF Document Generation by applying the approved JSON diffs to the base resume and cover letter markdown and passing it to WeasyPrint to produce an ATS-friendly PDF.

userStories.title: Resume PDF Compilation Utility
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want my tailored resume JSON converted into an ATS-friendly PDF using WeasyPrint, so that I can submit it directly to job applications without manual formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Rendering tailored resume to PDF
Given a tailored_resume matching the BaseResumeSchema
When the PDF utility is called with this data and an output path
Then it renders a Jinja2 HTML template with the resume data
and Then WeasyPrint compiles this HTML into a PDF file at the specified path
and Then the resulting PDF file exists on disk.

tasks.description: Add `weasyprint` and `jinja2` to pyproject.toml via uv
Create src/templates/resume_template.html (Jinja2) for clean ATS-friendly layout
Create src/utils/pdf_compiler.py and implement compile_resume_pdf(resume_data: dict, output_path: str)
Write unit tests for compile_resume_pdf in tests/test_pdf_compiler.py

userStories.title: Cover Letter PDF Compilation Utility
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want my cover letter markdown converted into a PDF using WeasyPrint, so that it matches my resume's professional formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Rendering cover letter markdown to PDF
When the PDF utility is called with this markdown and an output path
Then it converts the markdown to HTML using the python-markdown library
and Then WeasyPrint compiles this HTML into a PDF file
and Then the resulting PDF file exists on disk.

tasks.description: Add `markdown` library to pyproject.toml via uv
Create src/templates/cover_letter_template.html (Jinja2) for the cover letter layout
Implement compile_cover_letter_pdf(markdown_text: str, output_path: str) in src/utils/pdf_compiler.py
Write unit tests for compile_cover_letter_pdf in tests/test_pdf_compiler.py

userStories.title: PDFCompilerNode Integration
userStories.description: As a system architect, I want the PDFCompilerNode to integrate the PDF utilities, so that the Child Sub-Graph automatically saves the output files and updates the graph state.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the ChildGraphState contains a tailored_resume, cover_letter_markdown, and job_details.job_id
Then it ensures an output directory exists (e.g. data/output/)
and Then it calls the PDF compilation utilities with appropriate paths
and Then it returns a state update containing resume_pdf_path and cover_letter_pdf_path.

tasks.description: Update pdf_compiler in src/nodes/child_nodes.py to call the new PDF utilities
Ensure the node creates data/output/ if it doesn't exist
Generate file names using job_id (e.g., data/output/{job_id}_resume.pdf)
Update the node to return resume_pdf_path and cover_letter_pdf_path
Write integration tests for the pdf_compiler node
